goals.primary: A Next.js web application that provides a task tracking interface with a REST API
secondary: Expose GET and POST endpoints for task management via /api/tasks
Render a server-side task list on the home page

inferred_vision.source_summary: A minimal Next.js 14 App Router project implementing an in-memory task tracker. Exposes a REST API at /api/tasks and renders tasks server-side on the home page. Written in TypeScript with React.
